description:
A developer has lost track of which Python script was used as the keyfile for their project archive. You have a directory of candidate files at `/home/ga/Documents/candidates/` and the password `DevOps2024`. 

Your goal is to:
1. Identify the correct keyfile that unlocks `/home/ga/Volumes/project_archive.hc` (combined with the password).
2. Mount the volume to `/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1`.
3. Extract the file `secret_token.txt` from inside the volume to `/home/ga/Documents/recovered_token.txt`.
4. Create a text file at `/home/ga/Documents/correct_keyfile_name.txt` containing JUST the filename of the working keyfile (e.g., `script.py`).
